'''haroyo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:bdellomicrovirus|bdellomicrovirus]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-r-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:bdellomicrovirus|bdellomicrovirus]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| haroyo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæreyeth|hæreyeth]] || [[word:hæreyej|hæreyej]] || [[word:hæreyesh|hæreyesh]] || [[word:hæreye|hæreye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:haroroyoth|haroroyoth]] || [[word:haroroyoj|haroroyoj]] || [[word:haroroyosh|haroroyosh]] || [[word:haroroyo|haroroyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:haroyoth|haroyoth]] || [[word:haroyoj|haroyoj]] || [[word:haroyosh|haroyosh]] || [[word:haroyo|haroyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:harofyoth|harofyoth]] || [[word:harofyoj|harofyoj]] || [[word:harofyosh|harofyosh]] || [[word:harofyof|harofyof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:haroyotho|haroyotho]] || [[word:haroyojo|haroyojo]] || [[word:haroyosho|haroyosho]] || [[word:haroyoko|haroyoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:haroyoth|haroyoth]] || [[word:haroyoj|haroyoj]] || [[word:haroyosh|haroyosh]] || [[word:haroyo|haroyo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:haroyothol|haroyothol]] || [[word:haroyojol|haroyojol]] || [[word:haroyoshol|haroyoshol]] || [[word:haroyokol|haroyokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:haroyothotho|haroyothotho]] || [[word:haroyojojo|haroyojojo]] || [[word:haroyoshosho|haroyoshosho]] || [[word:haroyoko|haroyoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:haroyothon|haroyothon]] || [[word:haroyojon|haroyojon]] || [[word:haroyoshon|haroyoshon]] || [[word:haroyokon|haroyokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:haroyothoro|haroyothoro]] || [[word:haroyojoro|haroyojoro]] || [[word:haroyoshoro|haroyoshoro]] || [[word:haroyokoro|haroyokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
